CAPABILITIES

Core Features & Solutions

🧠

Custom LLM & RAG Pipelines

Connect GPT-4 or Claude securely to your proprietary company data. Employees get instant, accurate answers without searching through Google Drive.

💡 Strategic Insight

Information Velocity: When your team can query your entire knowledge base instantly, decision-making happens faster, reducing the time-to-market for new distribution strategies.

Python
LangChain
OpenAI
Pinecone
FastAPI
Redis
⚙️

Process Automation Agents (n8n)

Highly focused, rule-driven agents designed for synchronous back-office workflows, such as Accounts Payable matching or HR screening.

💡 Strategic Insight

Capital Efficiency: By automating data entry, you eliminate the need to scale headcount linearly. That saved capital directly funds your content and audience acquisition.

n8n
Zapier
Make
Node.js
Python
PostgreSQL
🗣️

Voice & Customer Support Agents

Conversational systems that answer calls instantly, handle FAQs, and escalate complex queries. Ultra-realistic voice models with <500ms latency.

💡 Strategic Insight

The 'Always-On' Trust: Trust is broken when a customer waits 15 minutes on hold. An AI agent guarantees instantaneous, polite support 24/7, reinforcing your brand reliability.

OpenAI
Twilio
Python
FastAPI
Firebase
Node.js
📄

Intelligent Document Processing

Extract and structure data from PDFs, invoices, handwritten forms, and contracts automatically with 99.9% accuracy.

💡 Strategic Insight

Eliminating Friction: Removing the bottleneck of manual data extraction means you can onboard clients faster, getting them to their 'aha' moment sooner.

Python
TensorFlow
PyTorch
AWS
Google Cloud
FastAPI

THE DISTRIBUTION ADVANTAGE

Why you need AI (and why you don't)

Free Up Human Capital

Humans are terrible at data entry but great at building relationships. AI handles the former so your team can focus entirely on the latter.

Zero Marginal Cost Scaling

Once an AI agent is built, it costs fractions of a paisa to run. You can handle 10x the volume without hiring 10x the support staff.

Instant Gratification

Customers demand immediate answers. AI ensures your lead qualification and support happens instantly, capturing attention before competitors.

Standardized Output

AI doesn't have bad days. Output quality for tasks like invoice matching or code review remains consistently perfect.

When NOT to build AI

If your processes are currently chaotic and undocumented, AI will only scale the chaos. Standardize first, automate second.

Avoid AI 'Toys'

Don't build chatbots just because it's a trend. Build agents that tie directly to revenue or measurable cost reduction.

WHY TRAI INC

Engineering your automation

Business Logic First

We aren't just AI researchers; we are business engineers. We only deploy models where they drastically reduce your OPEX.

Fixed Price, ₹2L Base

You get a written scope and an exact Rupee price before development. No open-ended consulting fees or vague AI promises.

Data Privacy Guaranteed

We build RAG pipelines that ensure your proprietary data never trains public LLMs. We deploy locally or on secure VPCs.

Tech-Agnostic Approach

We use the best model for the job—whether that's GPT-4 for reasoning, Claude for large context, or Llama 3 for local privacy.

Founder-Led Commitment

We understand the 'long game'. We aren't an agency trying to maximize a single invoice; we engineer automation that builds your legacy.

Ongoing Maintenance

AI models evolve rapidly. We offer retainer packages in INR to ensure your agents stay updated with the latest foundation models.

USE CASES

Built for high-friction environments

B2B Supply Chain

Automated order parsing from WhatsApp/Email straight into your ERP.

Financial Services

Automated KYC extraction, compliance checking, and loan origination document processing.

Healthcare Clinics

AI voice receptionists that handle patient scheduling, FAQs, and appointment reminders.

Real Estate / Brokers

Instant lead qualification chatbots that engage buyers immediately after they fill out a form.

E-Commerce

Intelligent inventory forecasting and hyper-personalized post-purchase support agents.

Legal & HR

Resume screening pipelines and automated contract red-lining against standard templates.

THE METHODOLOGY

How We Deliver Quality

01. Process Mapping

We identify repetitive tasks and data silos in your operations that are ripe for AI disruption.

02. Model Selection & RAG

We select the right LLMs and connect them securely to your company knowledge base.

03. Deployment & Training

We deploy the AI tools to your team and train them on how to leverage their new digital workforce.

QUESTIONS & ANSWERS

Frequently Asked Questions

Simple rule-based agents take 2-4 weeks. Complex LLM-powered agents with RAG pipelines take 4-8 weeks. We start with a focused pilot to prove ROI before scaling.

Yes. We deploy models on your infrastructure or private cloud — your data never leaves your environment. All pipelines are encrypted, access-controlled, and audit-logged.

Our clients typically see 3-5x ROI within 6 months. The biggest gains come from eliminating manual data entry, reducing response times, and scaling operations without adding headcount.

Ready to scale without the headcount?

Book a scoping call. We'll map where automation actually saves you time and money — freeing up capital to build your audience.
